subject: fix(layout): distribute text across non-image cells when switching presets
body:
Previously, all text displaced from image cells was dumped into the first
non-image cell, making presets look cramped. Now header text (title/tagline)
goes to the first available non-image cell and body text (bodyHeading,
bodyText, cta, footnote) goes to the second, so presets look complete
out of the box.

Tags: layout, text, ux, presets
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: preset-text-distribution
Semver: patch
